channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass 1975 - Sunburst — $4,350
item.description:
$4,350 · Very Good · Southside Guitars

This Fender Jazz Bass was made in the USA in 1975. It shows normal play wear but overall it is in nice condition. The parts and finish are original, although it is missing the metal covers. It weighs 8 pounds 14 ounces. This bass has been pro-setup in our store and plays great. It comes with the original case.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe '70s Jazz Bass V 2019 - Present - Natural — $325
item.description:
$325 · Very Good · Don’s Guitar Grotto

Great bass for sale; In great condition, normal signs of use, never gigged only used at home studio. Very versatile, I just am looking to get a four string. Reasonable offers accepted.

item.title: Warmoth Jazz Bass - Medium Scale — $795
item.description:
$795 · Very Good · Manny V.

I rarely used this bass. I've had it for quite a while and I think I built in the early 2000's. The pickups I used from another bass I had. Those have some wear but work great. The strings A-D-G-C (Tenor Bass) and are old. It still sounded great with those strings. I can text you a video because I don't have YouTube.

Warmoth Medium Scale (32") Jazz Bass

- Bartolini 9J1 L/S Pickups

- Audere Preamp - Volume/Pan 3-Band EQ - 9V

- Gotoh Tuners

- Schaller 4-String Roller Bass Bridge- Schaller ???

- Warmoth Body - Alder or Ash ???

- Warmoth Maple Neck/Maple Fretboard - 32" Medium Scale - 1-1/2" Nut Width

item.title: Fender Modern Player Telecaster Bass 2012 - 2013 - Butterscotch Blonde — $771.55
item.description:
$771.55 · Very Good · Full Rack Outlet

Has some general wear and a few dings, most notably the one on the neck and the 2 on the headstock - see photos. Plays very well.

US shipping includes all customs fees.

item.title: Fender American Elite Jazz Bass V with Maple Fretboard 2016 - 2019 - Black — $1,699
item.description:
$1,699 · Very Good · Kyle’s Shop

Selling my fender elite bass, love everything about this bass but moneys tight and I’m paying for my wedding.

Bass has been used and has normal signs of it. Light scratches on the back, a few small dings in the front that are hardly noticeable besides the single paint chip just above the pickup. Photos show them on the closeup. Besides cosmetics this bass works great and has been babied since i got it from its last owner. If you have any questions on specs feel free to shoot me a message or look up the serial number for in depth info on fenders site. Thanks for looking!

item.title: Squier Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI Antigua CME Exclusive Limited Edition with Hard Case — $699
item.description:
$699 · Excellent · Leonardo's Gear Outlet

Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI Antigua CME Exclusive Limited Edition with Hard Case

Limited-edition CME exclusive Antigua finish, completely unplayed with all tags and paperwork, included with a fitted hardshell case. Original owner, bought new from Chicago Music Exchange.

Description:

Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI in the limited Antigua finish, the Chicago Music Exchange exclusive run. This is the sought-after Antigua burst with the maple fingerboard, black block inlays, and black neck binding, a finish with a real cult following that rarely comes up unplayed.

This one is in excellent condition and completely unplayed. I bought it new from Chicago Music Exchange, original owner, and it has never been played, not a single gig or session. All hang tags, the certificate, and paperwork are still with it, and the tremolo arm is included.

The Bass VI is the short-scale six-string that sits between a guitar and a bass, tuned an octave lower, with three Fender-designed alnico single-coil pickups, individual on/off slide switches, the bass-cut strangle circuit, and the vintage-style floating tremolo. Great for studio textures, baritone parts, surf, and low-end doubling.

Condition: Mint and unplayed. No wear, no marks, no fret wear, everything as it left the shop. Fully functional. See photos, which show it new with the case candy and tags still attached.

Included:

  • Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI, Antigua (CME limited exclusive)
  • Tremolo arm
  • All original tags, certificate, and paperwork
  • Fitted hardshell case (these did not ship with a case, so this is a genuine add). The bass sits properly in the case, shown in the photos.

Why I'm selling: I picked it up, never ended up using it, and would rather it go to someone who will play it. It has sat stored and protected in the case since I got it.

Shipping and pickup: Local pickup welcome in the Miami / Aventura area. For buyers outside the area, I ship safely in the included hardshell case through Reverb. Message me with your location for a shipping quote if needed.

Price is $699 or best offer.

item.title: Fodera NYC Empire 5 Strings 70FH 21 NATURAL 2021 Natural — $4,408.83
item.description:
$4,408.83 · Mint · ReaDy

Body: Ash
Neck: maple 21F34"
Fingerboard: maple
Pickups: Fodera/Custom Single Coil Pickups
Preamp:Fodera/Custom 2-Band Preamp
Controls:Vol/Tone,Vol(active/passiveSW),Treble,bass
Pegs: Gotoh
Bridge:Gotoh
Weight: 4.3Kg
Gig bag included

Please note:
Import duties, taxies, and charges are not included in the item price or shipping cost.
These charges are the buyer’s responsibility.
Please check with your country’s customs office to determine what these additional costs will be prior to buying.

item.title: Hondo Bass 80s? - Blue — $350
item.description:
$350 · Fair · Alexander's Gear Bazaar

Converted fretless bass. Plays and sounds pretty decent. Fretboard is epoxy pour and turned out okay. All new hardware and flat wound strings. Cool bass to add to your collection

item.title: Magnum- Jazz 1970s - Natural — $345
item.description:
$345 · Fair · Alexander's Gear Bazaar

70s magnum jazz bass with all new hardware and new flat strings. Sounds awesome and plays pretty well. Its from the 70s so it is far from perfect but a cool bass to have in the collection

item.title: Custom 4 String Electric Bass, Sapele Top Body, with Maple Neck Through — $379.99
item.description:
$379.99 · Excellent · Myles Music Shop

Body：sapele wood
Fingerboard: technical wood
neck: Canada maple
Frets: 24F
Machine Head: Chrome Diecast
Finish: matte

item.title: Baldwin Burns Baby Bison Bass Guitar - All Original - Clean Poly Finish - Rare Palm Mute and Original OHSC included - 1966 — $889
item.description:
$889 · Very Good · Tom C.'s East Coast Spot

I am selling my Baldwin Burns Baby Bison Bass guitar, manufactured in England around 1965 and sold in the US by Baldwin. This bass is in very good condition, is all original, with a clean glossy polyurethane finish, very few nicks or scrapes, and a mostly pretty neck with some relief. The bridge screws are most likely stripped so I have made a workaround for height. The frets are in playable condition and the gear box truss rod is working. Comes in the original Burns/Baldwin hard case.

Things to note are the following: 

- The neck double coil pickup works and sounds full, the bridge pickup does not work. 

- The tiny screws which raise and lower the bridge may be stripped or may just need the exact hex tool, which I do not have. I have added two dimes to get the action comfortable for playing and this could be adjusted. It is not the best designed bridge system but is original.

- The zero fret has some wear on the g string side (pictured) and there is buzz if you pluck the first fret on the G string too hard. I have not worked with the truss rod much except to be sure it turns (Hex tool included) and have not taken the neck off to add or remove a shim. Both could resolve this as the frets look clean and the neck is pretty straight. Notes play across the fretboard with some buzz if you pick hard around the 14th fret on some of the strings.

- The often missing bridge mute is included and the foam is still somewhat soft on it. I do not use it but you may find it to your liking. One of the screws is slightly bent but it does screw into place.

- After I took these pictures I was cleaning the case and found a small chip that had come off the upper horn. Must have been in there for a decade or two - it has been reglued and can be seen in the tight shot in the case and one of the later shots of the horn.

The controls on this guitar, and other Burns from the mid sixties (Vibraslim, Baby Bison guitar) work a bit differently than normal. The three way switch is standard, the first knob towards the strings is volume, the middle knob is presence (it dials in the second coil on the neck pickup) and the third is tone. The effect of the presence knob is to make a less bright tone (to my ear) and the tone knob allows for more tonal variation. I have not seen a bass pickup of this type - the “Bar-O-Matics” - available online but have seen, and own, a number of 6 string versions. I’ve considered putting one into the bridge position but would rather leave it intact for you the buyer to decide. With the presence and tone options there are a few variations in sound to work with as is.

This is a substantial bass with a medium to wide neck - yet also has a comfortable 30 inch scale. Nut width is 1.75 inches. From the tip of the headstock to the bottom it is 45 inches long and the bout is about 15 inches across. It is hefty and weighs around 9.5 pounds.

The truss rod gear box (the same one in Gretsch guitars via the sale of Burns and Gretsch to Baldwin between 1965 and 1967) at the base of the neck turns at a very high 16:1 ratio, which means that about 4 turns seems to needed to do a bit of adjustment. I loosened the neck about a few turns recently and the truss rod has much more adjustment in it if for some reason you want to tinker.

Important note: The gear box turns opposite of what is “normal”. To the left is tightening, to the right is loosening. Feel free to look this up - I did and was surprised. The patented truss rod key is missing (I did not receive it when I bought the bass) but I learned that a spanner insert bit, 1/4" Hex Shank works well on these guitars. I have an extra so will include it.

The heavy polyester finish on this guitar is remarkably clean - often they are weathered and creased by the change in environment after being shipped overseas. The original Van Ghent tuners work smoothly and keep tune.

It seems I replaced the original jack at some point, the old jack is included. I have also included an image of string height @ 1st, 6th, 12th fret positions on both sides of the fretboard. There is no room to include the individual shots, will send directly if you would like. I have included an image of the pots, wiring and gear box stem.

I do not remember what strings I put on it when I changed them a year or so ago. It once had black taped roto-matic strings which sounded and felt great.

The original Baldwin case is included - it is solid and in very good shape.

I’ve described this 60 year old bass guitar as best as I can with words and images, if you have any questions be sure to ask me before you buy.

Will pack professionally and ship quickly. It is a heavy and large case so will let Reverb figure out the shipping cost.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe '50s Precision Bass 2020 - Present - White Blonde w/strings thru badass bridge w/improved pickup — $600
item.description:
$600 · Very Good · The Southern Californian

Have a squier classic vibe 50’s precision bass for sale. Hand wound pickup w/improved pots & input jack. Badass bridge II w/strings thru. Bass in really good shape. Comes w/gig bag

item.title: Godin A4 Ultra Fretted Bass - Semi Acoustic/Electric with Synth Access — $1,396.13
item.description:
$1,396.13 · Very Good · Full Rack Outlet

Great condition. Just has a little ding in one spot of the finish near the binding by the input jack, see photos. Comes with Godin bag.

US shipping includes all customs fees.

-

The A4 Ultra SA semi-acoustic bass feature more sonic possibilities than ever with the addition of a Low Profile Lace Sensor electric pickup with side mounted volume and tone controls.

Other features include Custom Godin electronics with individual saddle transducers in the bridge, custom preamp section voiced specifically for the A4 Ultra SA as well as output and 13-pin capabilities for computer and synth access. Incredible acoustic bass sounds are available through the output jack and controlling your tone is made easy with the Custom Godin Preamp section. The two-chambered body design found in all of the A-Series instruments is also at work in the A4 Ultra. This design resists feedback as well as the negative effects that loud stage levels can have on top vibration.

Specs:
• Rock Maple neck
• Rosewood Fingerboard on Fretted Version
• 16" fingerboard radius
• 34" Scale
• 1 1/2" nut width
• Two-Chamber, Silver Leaf Maple body
• Solid Spruce Top
• Lace Sensor, low profile electric pickup
• Side mounted volume & tone controls for electric pickup 
• Custom Godin Saddle Transducers and custom preamp
• Volume, Mid, Treble and Bass controls
• Natural Semi-Gloss

item.title: Fender Standard Jazz Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 1991 - 2008 - Natural — $500
item.description:
$500 · Good · Individual Owner

Made in Mexico , I’ve had it for quite a while . Guitar player . Plays great , I would factor in a setup as I feel the action is a little high . But everything is in working order . For the smart serial number types please comment if can figure out the actual age . But I’ve had it over 20 years .

item.title: ESP LTD Surveyor '87 2023 - Black — $550
item.description:
$550 · Very Good · Steven's Gear Emporium

2023 ESP LTD Surveyor reissue. Plays great, sounds great.
Bass weighs 9lbs 13oz.
The following changes have been made:
The original blend pot was changed to a 3 way toggle (NKK brand toggle)
The absolute garbage stock tuners were switched to Hipshots.

There is a scratch and clouding in the finish behind the nut that was there when I purchased the bass, due to this, I am listing the bass as "Very Good". This is shown in the pics.
There are no other issues with the bass other than the typical surface marks you will find on a black instrument that has been played.

Priced to sell.
Check my feedback and buy with confidence.

item.title: Fender Player II Modified Active Jazz Bass V with Maple Fretboard 2025 - Present - Olympic Pearl — $725
item.description:
$725 · Good · Jaimies Music Exchange

Some light dings here and there. It’s a great bass, but not for me sadly.


Selling to fund an ESP purchasd.

item.title: Fender Player II Modified Active Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2025 - Present - Olympic Pearl — $715
item.description:
$715 · Good · Jaimies Music Exchange

A ding on the body and some general headstock dings from gigs.

Plays great and feels great.

Selling to fund an ESP purchase.

item.title: 2005 Tune TWB-5T FM 5-String Flame Maple Electric Bass Natural Finish Bartolini’s NICE! — $1,095.95
item.description:
$1,095.95 · Very Good · The Tyler Roe Collection

2005 Tune TWB-5T Flame Maple Premium 5-String Bass in Natural finish.  

Active Bartolini Electronics. High quality Korean Craftsmanshi.

Very Good Condition! Has some playwear. Input jack has been moved to top of bass and there is also an added mini-toggle.

Includes Older Hard Shell Case in Fair Condition

-Instrument is sold *As Described* so please ask any and all questions before purchasing.

item.title: Wilkinson WJB760 2025 - Chrome — $30
item.description:
$30 · Excellent · Motherfuzzer's

These are a set of 2x2 bass tuners made by Wilkinson. I bought them for a project that never happened.

item.title: Steinberger Q5 90s - White — $10,000
item.description:
$10,000 · Good · TMC Associates

Steinberger Q5 5 string bass with Bartolini pickups and active electronics.
Owned by T Michael Coleman and played on recordings and live performances with Chesapeake. A few well earned road marks. Sounds amazing. Comes with well traveled soft shell case.

item.title: 2023 Roscoe SKB3005 Mastergrade Quilted Maple - Loaded — $3,700
item.description:
$3,700 · Mint · Shane's Gear Outlet


Edit: I have for sale other places and can save you money if your serious message.

This bass spared nothing as I picked out the best Keith had and it’s quite phenomenal on looks, build and Playability. Message me if you want to talk directly about this bass.

Specs:

1 piece lightweight ash body

Mastergrade quilted maple

Signature Wenge-Maple-Wenge neck

Ebony fretboard

Diamond wood nut

D-Cline Designs matching wood knobs

Nordstrand 3 band preamp with VTC tone control and active passive

Roscoe custom Quad coils.

New Heavy Duty Gigbag

8.3 pounds

35 inch scale

Beat B string in the business.

item.title: SQUIER - PRECISION CV 50' (2013) — $387.93
item.description:
$387.93 · Excellent · Hurricane Music

L’esprit P-Bass vintage, prêt à jouer

Cette Squier Classic Vibe Precision des années 50 (2013) est une basse 4 cordes au look Butterscotch Blonde et au son rond, idéal pour le rock, la soul et les lignes de basse bien assises. En dépôt-vente, elle est proposée en très bon état avec garantie 3 mois : une option sûre pour s’équiper d’un instrument fiable au caractère rétro.

Son manche en érable au profil en C offre une prise en main confortable, tandis que le micro simple bobinage Alnico “Fender Designed” délivre une attaque franche et une belle définition. Pour plus d’informations, contactez le magasin de Nantes.

Caractéristiques
  • Année : 2013
  • État : très bon état
  • Vente : produit d’occasion en dépôt-vente
  • Garantie : 3 mois
  • Série : Classic Vibe 50’s
  • Nombre de cordes : 4
  • Corps : pin
  • Manche : érable vissé
  • Forme : profil en C
  • Touche : érable
  • Repères : points noirs
  • Nombre de Frettes : 20
  • Taille des Frettes : hautes/étroites
  • Diapason : 864 mm
  • Radius : 241 mm
  • Largeur du Sillet : 43 mm
  • Sillet : os
  • Electronique : 1 micro simple bobinage Fender Designed Alnico
  • Controles : volume, tonalité
  • Chevalet : style Vintage, 4 pontets
  • Accastillage : nickelé
  • Mécaniques : style Vintage
  • Cordes : Fender USA Bass 7250M (.045–.105)
  • Autres : pickguard 1 pli blanc
  • Finition : Butterscotch Blonde

item.title: IBANEZ - ERGODYNE EDC700 (2002) — $245.57
item.description:
$245.57 · Excellent · Hurricane Music

Ergodyne EDC700 de 2002 : légère, moderne et polyvalente

Produit d'occasion en dépôt-vente / Garantie 3 mois / Contactez le magasin de Nantes pour plus d’informations.

Cette Ibanez Ergodyne EDC700 (2002) est une basse 4 cordes au look sobre et à la prise en main très confortable, grâce à son corps en luthite et ses 24 frettes accessibles. Son préampli actif avec égaliseur Vari-Mid HiFi offre une large palette de sons, du clair précis aux graves plus épais, idéale pour jouer en groupe comme en enregistrement. État : très bon état.

Caractéristiques
  • Fabricant : Ibanez
  • Modèle : Ergodyne EDC700
  • Année : 2002
  • Nombre de cordes : 4 cordes
  • Corps : luthite
  • Manche : érable
  • Touche : palissandre
  • Nombre de Frettes : 24
  • Taille des Frettes : medium
  • Micro Manche : SFR-N4
  • Micro Chevalet : SFR-B4
  • Electronique : active (égaliseur Vari-Mid HiFi)
  • Chevalet : Accu-Cast B20
  • Diapason : 34"
  • Largeur du Sillet : 38 mm
  • Autres : Ibanez EDC 700
  • Garantie : 3 mois
  • Vente : dépôt-vente

item.title: FENDER - JAZZ BASS STANDARD US FRETLESS (2003) + ETUI — $1,676.30
item.description:
$1,676.30 · Excellent · Hurricane Music

Une fretless Fender expressive, prête à jouer

Cette Fender Jazz Bass Standard US fretless de 2003 est une basse d’occasion en dépôt-vente, idéale pour les lignes chantantes, le glissé naturel et l’attaque boisée typique d’une fretless. Un instrument polyvalent pour le jazz, la pop ou les musiques actuelles, avec le confort et l’ergonomie d’une Jazz Bass américaine.

État : très bon état. Garantie 3 mois. Pour plus d’informations, contactez le magasin de Nantes. Livrée avec étui.

Caractéristiques
  • Marque : Fender
  • Modèle : Jazz Bass Standard US Fretless
  • Année : 2003
  • Configuration : fretless (sans frettes)
  • Origine : États-Unis
  • État : très bon état
  • Vente : dépôt-vente
  • Garantie : 3 mois
  • Etui/Housse : étui inclus

item.title: SIRE - MARCUS MILLER V7 SWAMP ASH + HOUSSE + SANGLE+STAND — $452
item.description:
$452 · Excellent · Hurricane Music

Le son Marcus Miller en version V7

Produit d'occasion en dépôt-vente / Garantie 3 mois / Contactez le magasin de Nantes pour plus d’informations.

Cette Sire Marcus Miller V7 en frêne des marais est réglée pour retrouver le grain des Jazz Bass des années 70, avec un manche érable au profil en C très confortable et une attaque précise. Le duo de simples Marcus Vintage-J Revolution et le préampli Marcus Heritage-3 offrent une large palette, du passif chaud et ouvert aux sons modernes plus sculptés, idéale pour funk, soul, pop ou studio. Livrée avec housse, sangle et stand.

Caractéristiques
  • État : très bon état (dépôt-vente)
  • Marque : Sire
  • Modèle : Marcus Miller V7
  • Corps : frêne des marais
  • Manche : érable, vissé
  • Forme : profil en C
  • Touche : érable
  • Repères : blocs noirs
  • Radius : 184 mm (7,25")
  • Diapason : 864 mm (34")
  • Largeur du Sillet : 38 mm (1,5")
  • Sillet : os
  • Nombre de Frettes : 20
  • Micro Manche : Marcus Vintage-J Revolution (simple bobinage)
  • Micro Chevalet : Marcus Vintage-J Revolution (simple bobinage)
  • Electronique : préampli Marcus Heritage-3 avec contrôle de fréquence des médiums
  • Controles : volume/tonalité (double potard), balance micros, aigus, médium/fréquence médium (double potard), graves
  • Sélecteur : mini switch actif/passif
  • Chevalet : Marcus Miller Vintage-S
  • Mécaniques : ouvertes Premium
  • Accastillage : chromé
  • Etui/Housse : housse incluse
  • Accessoires : sangle et stand inclus

item.title: Klos Apollo V Bass - Carbon Fiber Neck — $2,200
item.description:
$2,200 · Excellent · Guitarcissist

Skip the 3 month wait and save some $! Excellent condition, passive electronics and weighs under 7lbs. Super low action!

KLŌS's all-new Carbon Fiber 5-String Bass. With a wooden body and carbon fiber neck, you’ll get an experience unlike any bass on the market. The consistent structure of the carbon neck allows you to tune less and play more. Every fret sings, reverberating vibrant, clean tones through the wooden body anywhere you want to play it.

Neck Material - Carbon Fiber

Fretboard Material - Composite Ebony

Fret Material - Medium Jumbo SS (Plek'd)

Neck Shape - Slim C + D Blend

Number of Frets - 24

Fingerboard Radius - 12”

Nut Width - 45mm

Nut Material - Graphtech

Tuners - KLOS Black Featherlight Pro

Truss Rod - Steel with 4mm Hex Wrench

Scale Length - 34"

Body - Paulownia

Weight - Under 7lbs

Bridge - Black Aluminum w/ Brass Saddles

Bridge String Spacing - 18 mm

Pickguard - Carbon Fiber

Knobs - Black Aluminum

Case - KLOS Gig Bag

item.title: Ibanez SR400QM Standard Soungear Bass 2007 - 2014 - Transparent Lavender Sunburst — $359.99
item.description:
$359.99 · Excellent · Rhythmic Restorations

Here's a website description for the Ibanez SR400QM Transparent Lavender Burst:

Ibanez SR400QM Bass – Transparent Lavender Burst

Combining stunning looks with exceptional playability, the Ibanez SR400QM in Transparent Lavender Burst is a modern bass built for players who demand comfort, versatility, and professional performance. Its beautifully figured quilted maple top is showcased by the eye-catching Transparent Lavender Burst finish, making this bass stand out both on stage and in the studio.

The lightweight SR body is paired with Ibanez's fast and comfortable 5-piece maple/walnut neck, allowing effortless movement across the fretboard. Equipped with a pair of PowerSpan Dual Coil pickups and an active 3-band EQ, the SR400QM delivers a wide range of tones—from deep, punchy lows and articulate mids to crisp, defined highs. Whether you're playing rock, country, funk, worship, or metal, this bass has the tonal flexibility to handle it all.

Designed for comfort and built for performance, the SR400QM is an excellent choice for bassists looking for professional features, modern styling, and reliable tone in one versatile instrument.

Features:

  • Transparent Lavender Burst finish with quilted maple top
  • Lightweight SR body design for maximum playing comfort
  • Fast 5-piece maple/walnut neck
  • PowerSpan Dual Coil pickups
  • Active 3-band EQ for extensive tonal shaping
  • Accu-cast B500 bridge for solid sustain and intonation
  • Perfect for stage, studio, and everyday practice

A beautiful and versatile bass that's ready for any musical situation.

item.title: Epiphone Thunderbird-IV 1999 - 2020 - Vintage Sunburst — $449.99
item.description:
$449.99 · Excellent · Rhythmic Restorations

Here's a website-ready description for your Epiphone Thunderbird listing:

Epiphone Thunderbird IV Bass Guitar

The Epiphone Thunderbird IV delivers the iconic looks, powerful tone, and legendary performance that have made the Thunderbird a favorite among bass players for decades. Featuring the unmistakable reverse-body design, this bass offers incredible sustain, punchy low-end response, and a commanding stage presence.

Equipped with a pair of powerful TB Plus™ humbucking pickups, the Thunderbird IV produces deep, rich bass tones with plenty of growl and articulation, making it equally at home in rock, blues, country, and metal settings. The comfortable neck profile and smooth-playing fingerboard provide excellent playability for both beginners and seasoned performers.

Whether you're holding down the groove in the studio or commanding the stage at your next gig, the Epiphone Thunderbird IV delivers the classic sound and style that bass players have trusted for generations.

Features:

  • Iconic Thunderbird reverse-body design
  • Dual TB Plus™ humbucking pickups
  • Powerful low-end punch and sustain
  • Comfortable neck profile for easy playability
  • Perfect for live performance and recording
  • Comes with Gibson HSC

*Minor scratches around input jack area.

item.title: Tobias Classic 5 1997 - Oil Finish — $4,063.26
item.description:
$4,063.26 · Very Good · Chris Guitars 🎸

I am selling my beautiful 1997 Tobias Classic 5 (made in USA) with serial # 7407.

Specs are as follows:

· Walnut and Wenge Neck with Maple Veneer.

· Wenge Finger board.

· Body has straight Grain Walnut on top with thin maple plate and contrasting walnut body.

· Oil finish.

· Neck thru body.

· Original Tobias Bridge.

· Original Grover Tuning Pegs.

· Black Hardware.

· 24 Frets.

· Bartolini Pickups

· XTCT-LZ (9v) Pre-amp with Buffer (Volume, Blend, Mid, Bass and Treble)

· Two Way Switch (Active / Passive)

· Dual Truss Rods

· Total Weight 4.5kg Approx

· Brand New NYXL (45-125) Strings

This bass sounds super amazing with flawless playability. Very Well Kept with everything original and in good working condition. Seeing is believing! Only used in church services few times. I am open to sensible offers. No exchange/swaps. Collection is preference but can be delivered anywhere at buyers' expense. Only serious buyers please.

*Comes with Hardcase.

item.title: KILLER VINTAGE Greco/Univox VB Violin Bass 1960s-70s! — $385
item.description:
$385 · Very Good · Pilchuck Gear Barn

Here is a super cool vintage violin "Beatle Bass" likely from late 1960's. This example does not have brand on it but, headstock shape and identical features seen on Greco, Univox and many other branded basses.

It is in very good shape considering its near 60yrs old with a few minor paint dings and lacquer finish weather checking. No wood cracks or other structural damage. Neck is straight and plays well setup with .080 action measured at 12th fret. Scale length is 30" and neck is nice slim profile making playability a breeze. All parts original although missing pickguard. Comes with gig bag also

item.title: Squier Paranormal Rascal Bass HH 2023 - Present - Shell Pink — $345
item.description:
$345 · Very Good · Jared’s music sales

Overall great condition. Has a small chip at the bottom edge, few smaller marks here or there.

Great vibe and feel to it.

item.title: Fender Japan JB62-US Jazz Bass Sonic Blue – US Pickups Flame Maple Neck CIJ — $1,299
item.description:
$1,299 · Excellent · Professor Nigel's

🚚 FAST SHIPPING from Phoenix, AZ!
🎸 Local demo available by appointment in Phoenix, AZ

Condition

This bass is in Excellent condition with a few disclosed cosmetic issues.

The protective plastic is still on the pickguard. There are minor fine scratches and light surface scuffs across the body from normal handling. There is a tiny chip on the edge of the lower side of the neck pocket and two tiny dings near the neck plate, both pictured. There are a few shallow dents on the perimeter of the lower bout near the control cavity, also pictured. These marks are localized and do not affect playability, structure, or performance.

The frets show very little wear and have plenty of life remaining, with no buzzing or dead frets. The truss rod is in good working order with plenty of adjustability in both directions. The neck is straight with no signs of warping or waviness. The tuners and bridge show light patina.

Alpha 250k pots were installed by a prior owner, and the electronics are clean and fully functional. We replaced the original crumbling pickup foam to ensure proper pickup height and stability.

This bass has been professionally set up with DR Strings Pure Blues 45-100 roundwound strings, medium action, adjusted relief, intonation dialed in up and down the neck, and pickup height set.

A brand new Fender FB620 bass gig bag is included. Hard case available upon request for an additional fee.

Specifications

Weight: 9 lbs 9 oz
Case: Brand new Fender FB620 bass gig bag
Nut Width: 1.5 in
12th Fret Width: 2.24 in
1st Fret Depth: 0.80 in
12th Fret Depth: 0.94 in
Nut Material: Bone
Body Material: Alder
Body Finish: Sonic Blue, Polyester Gloss Clearcoat
Neck Material: Flame Maple
Fingerboard Material: Rosewood
Number of Frets: 20
Fret Size: Vintage
Fingerboard Radius: 7.25 in / 184.1 mm
Scale Length: 34" / 864 mm
Bridge: 4-Saddle Spiral Saddle Vintage-Style
Pickups: US-made Vintage Jazz Bass single coil x2
Controls: Neck Volume, Bridge Volume, Tone
Hardware Finish: Chrome
Serialization: Q0XXXXX, Crafted in Japan
Country of Manufacture: Japan

Professor’s Notes

A standout Crafted in Japan JB62-US with an aged Sonic Blue finish, US-made Jazz Bass pickups, alder body, rosewood fingerboard, and a gorgeous flame maple neck. This is a sweet-playing, lively, and unusually compelling Fender Japan bass with classic 60s Jazz Bass feel and a little extra visual magic.

Description

The JB62-US was Fender Japan’s ’62 Jazz Bass reissue specification with upgraded US-made pickups. This example is especially compelling thanks to its aged Sonic Blue finish, alder body, rosewood fingerboard, and unusually figured flame maple neck.

Given the serial number and parts markings, this bass was likely produced by Tokai Gakki for Fender Japan. It has the feel and detail work that make the better Crafted in Japan Fender instruments so appealing: clean neck work, stable setup, strong acoustic response, and a familiar vintage-style playing feel.

The neck has a classic Jazz Bass profile with a 7.25-inch radius, vintage-size frets, gloss finish, and comfortable taper. The flame figuring throughout the maple gives this bass a more boutique feel without taking it away from the traditional ’62 Jazz Bass formula.

The US-made Jazz Bass single coil pickups deliver the sound you want from a great passive Jazz Bass: clear bridge pickup growl, round neck pickup depth, and a balanced, articulate blended tone. The alder body keeps the low end controlled while giving the bass a focused midrange and rounded top end.

The original pots were replaced by a prior owner with quality Alpha 250k units and a 0.047µF polyester film green drop capacitor. Controls remain traditional neck volume, bridge volume, and master tone, with no modifications to the circuit function.

Color note: This finish presents with a mint / turquoise hue in person and in photos. It is listed as Sonic Blue based on best visual match and Fender Japan naming conventions, and reads lighter and greener than Daphne Blue but less green than Surf Green.

Why Buy From Professor Nigel’s?

Curated, Working-Player Instruments — Every instrument here earns its place by offering something genuinely compelling musically, ergonomically, or creatively — not by filling catalog space.

Detailed Inspection & Setup Process — Instruments receive careful inspection, professional setup work, detailed measurements, and accurate listing photography so buyers can purchase with confidence.

Fast, Reliable Shipping from Phoenix, AZ — Orders are packed carefully and shipped quickly with clear communication throughout the process.

item.title: 2004 Music Man S.U.B. 2EQ HDWE Kit Electric Bass Textured Black + HSC — $895
item.description:
$895 · Excellent · Lovies Guitars

Another quality Bass from Lovies Guitars!

Lovies Guitars is excited to present this 2004 Music Man S.U.B. 2EQ HDWE Kit Electric Bass finished in Textured Black. The Music Man S.U.B. series brought the legendary StingRay platform to players looking for the same iconic tone, feel, and performance in a more affordable package. Built with the same spirit of innovation and reliability that made Music Man famous, this bass delivers massive punch, excellent playability, and the unmistakable StingRay character.

The S.U.B. 2EQ features the classic Music Man formula with a powerful humbucking pickup and active 2-band EQ, delivering everything from deep, focused lows to aggressive, cutting mids and highs. Whether you're playing rock, funk, pop, or studio work, this bass provides the authoritative tone and response that have made the StingRay one of the most recorded basses in history.

The Textured Black finish gives this bass a rugged, professional look while maintaining the classic Music Man aesthetic. Comfortable, dependable, and built to perform, this is an excellent example of a clean early S.U.B. bass.

This bass is all original (OG) and comes complete with its Hardshell Case (HSC).

Condition: 9.6/10 - Excellent. Very clean example with no dings or scratches on the front or back. There is a light scuff on the tip/top of the headstock and a small tiny finish scuff on the treble horn. Overall, exceptionally clean for its age.

SPECS
Model: 2004 Music Man S.U.B. 2EQ HDWE Kit Bass
Finish: Textured Black
Body: Basswood
Neck: Maple
Fingerboard: Rosewood
Scale Length: 34"
Frets: 21
Pickup: Music Man Humbucking Pickup
Preamp: Active 2-Band EQ
Controls: Volume, Treble, Bass
Bridge: Music Man Standard Bridge
Hardware: Black
Tuners: Open Back Tuners
Case: Hardshell Case (HSC)
Condition: 9.6/10 - Excellent

Lovies Guitars Guarantee
A fantastic Music Man S.U.B. Bass offering classic StingRay-inspired tone, excellent playability, and legendary Music Man reliability. Original, exceptionally clean, and ready for the stage, studio, or collection, this Textured Black S.U.B. is a great example of an early 2000s Music Man bass.

Weighs in at: 9.45lbs
1st Fret: .810"
12th Fret: .910"
Nut Width: 1 11/16"
Serial: X05746
SKU: 9984

Each guitar comes with a sample of Fret-Not fret and fingerboard cleaner and our favorite Cooper Pick.

We offer a 14-day money-back return policy. Buy with confidence.

All guitars are guaranteed to arrive in the condition as described, and a full refund will be issued if not. Additionally, all our guitars are fully insured, and we will assist with any claims that may arise.

Lovies Guitars holds a CITES Master File, and we can provide certificates when and where they are required. We are also declaration-friendly, ensuring a smooth experience for international shipments.

item.title: G&L Tribute L-2000 2008 Sunburst with bag — $719
item.description:
$719 · Excellent · ADK Guitar

Gently used G&L L – 2000 tribute for string electric bass. Sunburst gloss finish looks even better in person. The pick ups are packed with tone and the neck plays great. Includes a matching G&L gig bag.

item.title: Ibanez RB800-FB Roadstar II Bass 1987 - Fountain Blue — $799
item.description:
$799 · Very Good · ADK Guitar

Rare Japanese made Ibanez RB 800 road star II 4 string electric bass in a rare fountain blue finish. There are some light signs of cosmetic wear from normal use but given the age of this instrument it is in very good condition with plenty of life left. The neck plays great and the pickups have a great vintage tone. Include the original Ibanez hardshell case as well.(pictured)

item.title: Lakland HB30 Short Scale - Sunburst — $1,025
item.description:
$1,025 · Very Good · Bass-ment Bob's Quality Bass Gear

Beautiful Semi-Hollow bodied, 30" short scale 4 string bass. Carved mahogany body with a carved maple top, boutique quality. Maple neck with Indian Laurel (Pau Ferro) fingerboard. 2 Lakland single coil pickups. 1.500" wide Jazz bass nut width. S/N# HB3129. Lightweight hipshot tuners. This bass weighs in @ 7.2 lbs and is balanced on your shoulder. Super comfortable to play! To ship in a Fender gig bag in excellent condition. Does show some evidence of being played with very little wear.

item.title: Squier Jaguar Bass -Charcoal Frost Metallic- — $225
item.description:
$225 · Excellent · GravityMusicGear

  • Make/Model: Squier Jaguar Bass
  • Year: 2021
  • Serial Number: CYKJ21005966
  • Location of Manufacture: China
  • Scale Length: 34"
  • Nut Width: 1 1/2"
  • Weight: 7.8lbs
  • Finish Color: Charcoal Frost Metallic
  • Pickup/Control Layout: Humbucker Pickup, Volume, Tone
  • Neck Wood: Maple
  • Fingerboard Wood: Rosewood
  • Case: Does not Include case, but will be professionally packed and shipped
  • Features: 20 Frets, Dot Inlays, Chrome Hardware w/ Open Gear Tuning Machines
  • Condition: This is a fantastic bass guitar! The body looks great overall, but the treble side of the body has some scratches and blemishes worth noting that run from the horn down to the lower bout. The pickguard has film atop still protecting it from any lasting pickmarks, and the hardware all looks great with no notable blemishes. The neck is straight and smooth, the fretboard is clean and the frets are polished. The frets look untouched as they have plenty of life left! The headstock has some scrapes along the top edge as well as some red marking. This is a great bass guitar, but because this is a preowned item be sure to inspect photos carefully before purchase. All electronics have been tested and are in working condition. Everything which is included is pictured and is ready to be professionally packed and shipped.

06242026-02 KADK

item.title: 1963 Fender Precision Bass Black Refin Pre-CBS w/HSC — $12,495
item.description:
$12,495 · Very Good · Imperial Vintage Guitars

1963 Fender Precision Bass Black Refin Pre-CBS w/HSC

This Item Is Located At Imperial Vintage Guitars Sherman Oaks

In Very Good Overall Condition (Please See Photos)

Made In USA

Original 1963 Solid Alder Body Was Professionally Refinished In Custom Color Black Nitrocellulose Lacquer 

Body Shows Playwear Throughout Including Professional Light Relicing, Marks, Dings And Scratches (As Shown)

Two Original Black-Bottom Pickups With Original Enamel Coated Wire (As Shown) 

Original Electronics

Potentiometers Date To 1963 (See Photos)

Original Tortoise-Shell Pickguard Shows Some Typical Shrinking (As Shown)

Original Bridge

Original Strap Buttons

Original Bridge + Pickup Cover And Knurled Flat-Top Control Knobs

Original L-Series Neckplate 

Original Maple Bolt-On Neck Dates To Nov 5th, 1963

Original Finish On Back Of Neck Shows Some Playwear (See Photos)

Original Unbound Brazilian Rosewood Veneer Fingerboard With Clay Dot Inlays

Original Frets Are Low And Show Playwear Including Some Dings And Marks, But Are In Good Playable Condition (As Shown)

Headstock Faceplate Was Professionally Refinished In Matching Black Nitrocellulose Lacquer, Including Professional Relicing Job (See Photos)

Replaced Decal

Original String Tree

Original Open-Gear 4-A-Side Tuning Machines

Weight: 8lbs 11oz

Nut Width: 1.71" (C)

Neck Depth At 1st Fret: .78"

Neck Depth At 12th Fret: .98"

Comes As Shown With New Fender Hardshell Case And No Additional Accessories

A true pre-CBS bass with undeniable vintage Fender character, this 1963 Precision Bass delivers the unmistakable tone and feel that have made these instruments legendary. Featuring its original black-bottom pickups, original electronics, Brazilian rosewood fingerboard, and original hardware components, it retains the heart and soul collectors and players seek. The professionally executed black nitro refin and matching headstock refinish give it a striking custom-color aesthetic while offering an excellent opportunity to own an authentic 1963 Precision Bass.

item.title: Fender American Vintage II 1966 Jazz Bass Rosewood Lake Placid Blue w/case — $2,699.99
item.description:
$2,699.99 · Brand New · Tone Shop Guitars

The Fender American Vintage II 1966 Jazz Bass is a period-accurate recreation of one of the most refined iterations of the mid-’60s J Bass. Built with an alder body and finished in gloss nitrocellulose lacquer, this model captures the feel and tone of a true 1966-era instrument, complete with white neck binding, pearl dot inlays, and a matching painted headstock .

A 1966 “U”-shape maple neck pairs with a bound round-laminated rosewood fingerboard featuring a vintage-correct 7.25" radius and vintage tall frets. Pure Vintage ’66 Jazz Bass single-coil pickups deliver the articulate growl, focused low end, and dynamic response that defined the era. With period-correct hardware including “lollipop” tuners and a 4-saddle threaded bridge, this bass stays true to its roots in both tone and feel.

Highlights
  • Period-accurate 1966 Jazz Bass design with matching headstock
  • Alder body finished in gloss nitrocellulose lacquer
  • 1966 “U” maple neck with bound round-laminated rosewood fingerboard
  • Pure Vintage ’66 Jazz Bass single-coil pickups
  • Pure Vintage “lollipop” tuners and threaded saddle bridge
Specifications

Body

  • Body Material: Alder
  • Body Finish: Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer
  • Color: Lake Placid Blue
  • Pickguard: 3-Ply Aged White

Neck

  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Neck Profile: 1966 “U”
  • Neck Finish: Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer
  • Fingerboard: Bound Round-Laminated Rosewood
  • Fingerboard Radius: 7.25" (184.1 mm)
  • Number of Frets: 20
  • Fret Size: Vintage Tall
  • Position Inlays: White Pearloid Dot (7 mm)
  • Nut Material: Bone
  • Nut Width: 1.5" (38.1 mm)
  • Scale Length: 34" (86.36 cm)

Hardware

  • Bridge: Pure Vintage 4-Saddle with Threaded Steel Saddles
  • Tuning Machines: Pure Vintage “Lollipop”
  • Hardware Finish: Nickel/Chrome
  • Control Knobs: Black Plastic

Electronics

  • Pickups: Pure Vintage ’66 Single-Coil Jazz Bass (Bridge and Middle)
  • Pickup Switching: None
  • Controls: Volume 1 (Middle Pickup), Volume 2 (Bridge Pickup), Master Tone

Miscellaneous

  • Strings: Fender USA 7250M Nickel Plated Steel (.045–.105), PN 0737250406
  • Case: Vintage-Style Black (Orange Interior)
  • Orientation: Right Handed
  • Country of Origin: USA
Why Buy from Tone Shop Guitars?

At Tone Shop Guitars, we pride ourselves on offering a curated selection of instruments backed by knowledgeable staff and exceptional customer service. Whether you're shopping online or visiting us in person, our goal is to help you find the right guitar and deliver a top-tier experience every step of the way.

item.title: Jackson JS Series Spectra Bass JS3Q, Dark Sunburst, Laurel Fingerboard — $499.99
item.description:
$499.99 · Brand New · Instrumentpro Inc

Four-string bass with a scale length of 863.6 mm
Poplar body with quilt maple top
Maple neck with scarf joint and ebony headstock
Laurel fingerboard with compound radius, 24 frets, and white dot inlays
Passive Jackson humbucking pickups with moderate output
Two-position switch with coil-split function, blend knob, 3-band EQ (active only), and push/pull volume control
Jackson HiMass bridge

item.title: Fender James Jamerson 1962 Precison Bass — $2,999.99
item.description:
$2,999.99 · Brand New · Dave's Guitar Shop

From Fender:

"The James Jamerson 1962 Precision Bass® – your gateway to the legendary sound that powered the Motown revolution.

James Jamerson is widely recognized as the single most influential bassist of all time. Consistently ranked #1 on “greatest bassists” lists, he laid down the groove on dozens of hit songs that defined the Motown sound. His incredible musical prowess and signature style didn’t just define a genre – Jamerson rewrote the rulebook for what was possible on electric bass, influencing legends like Paul McCartney, Marcus Miller, John Entwistle, and Geddy Lee.

The Bass That Built Motown

Jamerson’s signature instrument was his beloved 1962 Precision Bass – the foundation beneath countless hits that shaped popular music forever. This stunning eracorrect tribute instrument celebrates James’ legacy and his inseparable association with the Precision Bass, delivering the authentic vintage sound and feel that defined an era.

Authentic Vintage Craftsmanship

Every detail honors the original, from the premium Heirloom Nitrocellulose Lacquer finish to the era-correct neck shape that captures the feel of Jamerson’s legendary instrument. The custom James Jamerson ‘62 Precision Bass pickup celebrates those unmistakable tones that anchored the Motown hit factory.

Premium Heritage Features

The Heirloom™ Nitrocellulose™ lacquer finish delivers the authentic spirit and aging characteristics that made the original so special. The premium tone and meticulous attention to detail ensure this bass performs to the highest professional standards. Experience the James Jamerson Precision Bass and feel the difference that inspired generations."

3-Tone Sunburst, Alder Body, "Heirloom" Nitrocellulose Lacquer Finish, James Jamerson 1962 "C" Shaped Maple Neck with Slab Rosewood Fretboard and Clay Dot Inlays, 20 Vintage Tall Frets, 34" Scale Length, James Jamerson '62 Split Single-Coil Precision Bass Middle Pickup, Master Volume and Master Tone Controls, Pure Vintage 4-Saddle Bridge with Threaded Steel Saddles, Pure Vintage Reverse Open-Gear Tuning Machines, 9.3 Pounds, Comes with Original Hardshell Case.

item.title: Yamaha TRBX305 5-String Bass - White — $469.99
item.description:
$469.99 · Brand New · Haggerty's Music

-YOU ARE VIEWING PHOTOS OF THE ACTUAL BASS GUITAR BEING SOLD!

This brand new 8.8 lb Yamaha will ship insured, fully set up, and inspected from Rapid City, SD.

Buy risk free with our 14 day - full refund, less shipping, return policy.  Check out our shop policies for more details.

The Yamaha TRBX305 5-String Bass is built for players who need extended range, modern tone shaping, and dependable comfort in one streamlined instrument. Available now at Haggerty’s Music, this bass pairs a sculpted mahogany body with Yamaha’s performance-focused electronics, making it a strong choice for rock, worship, funk, pop, metal, and studio work.

Its 5-piece maple/mahogany neck offers excellent stability and a fast, comfortable feel, while the precision bolt-on neck joint helps deliver punchy response and clean note definition. The 5-string layout expands the low end without sacrificing playability, and the high-mass bridge with 0.709" string spacing gives players solid feel and excellent adjustability.

A pair of Yamaha YGD-designed M3 ceramic humbuckers provides powerful, noise-free tone with excellent depth and clarity. The active Performance EQ system offers five preset EQ curves for fast access to essential sounds, while the master 2-band EQ lets you fine-tune your tone for any musical setting.

Features / Specs

Highlights

  • Series: TRBX300
  • Orientation: Right-Handed
  • Color: White

Body

  • Body Material: Mahogany
  • Body Finish: Gloss
  • Body Shape: TRBX
  • Body Style: Solid Body

Neck

  • Headstock Type: Yamaha 5-String (3+2)
  • Neck Material: 5-Piece Maple/Mahogany
  • Neck Shape: Fast Modern Bass Profile
  • Neck Finish: Satin
  • Neck Depth: 0.795” at 1st Fret, 0.877” at 12th Fret
  • Neck Construction: Bolt-On
  • Fingerboard Material: Rosewood
  • Position Inlays: Pearloid Dot
  • Side Dots: White
  • Number of Frets: 24
  • Truss Rod Style: Adjustable
  • Truss Rod Nut: Headstock Access
  • Nut Material: Urea
  • Nut Width: 1.693”
  • Fret Size: Medium
  • Scale Length: 34”

Hardware

  • Bridge: High-Mass Die-Cast Bridge
  • Bridge Cover/Tail Piece: None
  • Bridge Mounting: Direct Body-Mounted
  • Pickguard: None
  • Pickup Covers: Black
  • Control Knobs: Knurled Metal Dome-Style
  • Switch Tip: None
  • Hardware Finish: Black
  • Tuning Machines: Yamaha Die-Cast
  • String Trees: None
  • Neck Plate: None (4-Bolt Contour)
  • Strap Buttons: Standard
  • Output Jack: Yamaha Metal Plate-Mounted 1/4”

Electronics

  • Pickup Configuration: HH
  • Neck Pickup: Yamaha YGD-Designed M3 Ceramic Humbucker
  • Bridge Pickup: Yamaha YGD-Designed M3 Ceramic Humbucker
  • Controls: Master Volume, Pickup Balance, Bass, Treble
  • Switching: 5-Way Performance EQ Selector
  • Auxiliary Switching: Active Performance EQ Circuit

Miscellaneous

  • Accessories: Yamaha Literature
  • Case/Gig Bag: None
  • Serial Number: IMK173446
  • Manufacture Date: 2026

item.title: ESP LTD B-15 Electric Bass Black Satin B-Stock — $199
item.description:
$199 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

ESP LTD B-15 Electric Bass Black Satin B-Stock

The LTD B-15 puts a solid five-string platform in your hands with a thin U-shaped maple neck and balanced 34″ scale that sits naturally whether you're locking into pocket duty or exploring extended range material. This B-Stock unit delivers full functionality at a reduced price, with only cosmetic variations from new inventory. The active tone-shaping electronics and dual ESP Designed pickups give you the sonic flexibility to dial in classic P and J voicings without fuss.

Playability & Build

The bolt-on maple neck features a thin U profile and 24 XJ frets on a treated hardwood fretboard with dot inlays, keeping your hand comfortable across the entire range. A 34″ scale and 43mm nut width work equally well for players building five-string chops or seasoned touring musicians, while the solid basswood body in Black Satin finish delivers the tonal balance and road durability you need in a working instrument.

Tone & Electronics

The combination of an ESP Designed LDP P-style pickup at the neck and ESP Designed LDJ J-style pickup at the bridge covers everything from traditional punch to modern clarity. Dual volume controls and an active ATB-1 Tone Boost circuit let you reshape your tone on the fly without overcomplicating the signal path, while the 5-string configuration (.045–.125 gauge) extends your range down to low B for the styles you're playing now and the ones you'll explore next.

Key Features
  • 5-string configuration with 34″ scale length
  • Bolt-on maple neck with thin U-shaped profile
  • 24 frets on treated hardwood fretboard with dot inlays
  • Solid basswood body in Black Satin finish
  • ESP Designed LDP P-style neck pickup
  • ESP Designed LDJ J-style bridge pickup
  • Active electronics with 2x Volume and ATB-1 Tone Boost controls
  • Chrome hardware with LTD bridge and tuners
  • Factory string gauge .045–.125
  • Gig bag case included
  • Manufactured in Indonesia

The B-15 cuts through without compromise—genuine ESP manufacturing, active electronics you can trust night after night, and a neck that feels at home in any player's hands.

This specific B-Stock unit features minor cosmetic imperfections typical of B-Stock inventory. These marks are purely superficial and have absolutely zero impact on the playability, tone, or structural integrity of the bass. Acquire this premium ESP LTD precision-style instrument at a significant B-Stock discount while maintaining full manufacturer warranty coverage and complete confidence in its performance.

item.title: 2001 Warwick German Corvette 5 BO w/truss rod issue — $1,000
item.description:
$1,000 · Fair · Andrew's Gear Locker

2001 Corvette 5, BO, Bubinga body with oil/wax finish, ovangkol neck, wenge fretboard, bronze frets - beautiful shape. Cosmetically Excellent, electronics work perfectly. Just-a-Nut II functions well, but side tabs are missing.

The only problem is the truss rod hex is stripped (as it was when I bought it but NOT told about). Professionally set up and frets leveled in May 2026, with action and relief within Warwick specs 0.75mm bass side, 0.46mm treble side; action at 2.5mm (B), 1.9 mm (G). Weight: 10.5 #.

Plays beautifully as is, but cannot guarantee further adjustment. Reduced price reflects truss rod issue. Price does NOT include shipping, within continental US only. Other than the truss rod issue, the bass would be worth $1500 or more. A clever luthier may know another way to work the truss rod, or you could have it replaced. But as it sits, it plays very well with decent action and no fret noise unless played aggressively high up the neck. Restrung in May with a set of Warwick Black Label 40-60-80-100-130

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe 70s 5-String Jazz Bass, Black, Maple Fingerboard — $476.94
item.description:
$476.94 · Very Good · Liquid Audio

The Classic Vibe ‘70s Jazz Bass V is a nod to the 1970s evolution of the J Bass , combining the luxurious playability that made it famous with the versatility and massive tone of its dual Fender-Designed alnico single-coil pickups. Player-friendly features include a slim, comfortable C -shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5 -radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets, as well as a vintage-style bridge with slotted barrel saddles for solid string stability. This throwback Squier model also features 1970s-inspired headstock markings, rich-looking nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tint gloss neck finish for an old-school vibe.

The Classic Vibe ‘70s Jazz Bass V is a nod to the 1970s evolution of the J Bass, combining the luxurious playability that made it famous with the versatility and massive tone of its dual Fender-Designed alnico single-coil pickups. Player-friendly features include a slim and comfortable “C”-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5”-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets as well as a vintage-style bridge with slotted barrel saddles. This throwback Squier model also features 1970s inspired headstock markings, nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tinted gloss neck finish for an old-school aesthetic vibe.

item.title: Eastwood Warren Ellis Bass -Left Handed - 2024 - Black — $666.99
item.description:
$666.99 · Excellent · Matt's Music Basement

2024 Open Box Demo- Eastwood Warren Ellis Left Handed 4 string Bass Guitar. Minty fresh - still has protective plastic on pick guard and pickup. Not a scratch on her.

item.title: 1998 Yamaha John Myung Signature 6-String Bass – Emerald Green – Made in Taiwan — $1,700
item.description:
$1,700 · Very Good · Mike's Gear

Up for sale is a 1998 Yamaha John Myung Signature 6-string bass in the beautiful Transparent Emerald Green finish. This bass has been well cared for and is in excellent playing condition.

If you’re looking for a professional-quality 6-string with incredible tone and effortless playability, this one won’t disappoint. The neck is straight, the action is low and comfortable, and the active electronics produce a loud, clear, articulate sound with outstanding punch and sustain.

Specifications

  • 1998 Yamaha John Myung Signature Bass
  • Made in Taiwan
  • 6-String Fretted
  • Bolt-On Maple Neck
  • Active Electronics
  • Yamaha Soapbar Pickups
  • Transparent Emerald Green Finish
  • Gold Hardware
  • Gig Bag Included

Condition

The bass plays exactly as it should. The neck is straight, the frets have minimal wear, and all electronics function properly.

There are a few small finish scrapes along the edge of the body (please see photo). These are cosmetic only and do not affect the playability or performance of the instrument. Overall, it presents exceptionally well for a bass from 1998.


Features

  • Powerful active pickups
  • Fast, comfortable neck
  • Excellent sustain
  • Smooth, low action
  • Ready to play

This bass will be professionally packed, fully insured, and shipped with a gig bag.

Please review all photos carefully, as they are part of the description. Feel free to message me with any questions or if you’d like additional photos. Thanks for looking!

item.title: 2004 Washburn AB-20 Acoustic Bass — $350
item.description:
$350 · Very Good · Back Beat Music

Very good condition. Minor signs of use but no abuse. Volume knob has been replaced. Electronics appear to be fully functional and clean. Neck is straight and fully adjustable. Brand new Ernie Ball acoustic Bass strings. No bag or case unless asked for an offer. Will be professionally packed for safe arrival.

item.title: Ibanez TMB100-SDL Standard Talman Bass 2023 - Soda Blue — $200
item.description:
$200 · Excellent · Kat's Guitars

Up for sale is a Ibanez TMB100-SDL Standard Talman Bass 2023 - Soda Blue. This bass has been fully inspected and tested by our in-house tech and has been confirmed to be structurally solid with no issues affecting playability or functionality.

The guitar shows very minor cosmetic wear. Our tech has confirmed these are strictly cosmetic issues only and do not affect the stability, tone, electronics, or playability in any way.

Features:

  • Electronics tested and functioning properly

Condition Notes:

  • Great overall condition
  • Minimal cosmetic wear from normal play & use
  • No issues affecting playability or function

Weight:

  • Bass only: approximately 8 lbs
  • Estimated packed shipping weight (guitar + case + shipping materials): approximately 15 lbs

The guitar will be professionally packed and shipped securely with proper protection.

Please review all photos carefully for condition details and feel free to message with any questions before purchasing.
